mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals stronger manufacturing activity, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of rising INDPRO are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 3.0% signals tight labor markets, increasing wage pressures and corporate profitability, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 3.0% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL indicate monetary tightening amid inflation, raising discount rates and compressing equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: 20-day SPX returns are positive in 60%+ of instances where both FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) combined with rising retail sales (RSAFS) indicate robust consumer demand, driving equity market optimism and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where both HOUST and RSAFS rise simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL (inflation) compresses real interest rates, increasing equity valuations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL rises despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in housing starts (HOUST) above 1600 thousand units signals strong residential demand, boosting construction-related sectors and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 5 days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1600 thousand units.

mechanism_narrative: Strong job growth (PAYEMS) combined with low unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a tight labor market, increasing corporate pricing power and driving positive S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where both PAYEMS and UNRATE meet the trigger conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising FEDFUNDS during a monetary tightening cycle signals higher discount rates, reducing equity valuations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are positive in 60%+ of instances during periods when FEDFUNDS rises.
